item.livingword.scripture_disc.tooltip: Right-click to choose a passage. Use on a jukebox to play.
item.livingword.scripture_disc.tooltip.c: Right-click to choose passage, translation, and narrator.
item.livingword.scripture_disc.tooltip.j: Use on an empty jukebox to insert and start nearby listening.
item.livingword.scripture_disc.tooltip.s: Empty-hand click pauses/resumes. Sneak empty-hand click ejects and resets.
gui.livingword.disc.mode.continue: Continue book plays each following chapter in order.
gui.livingword.disc.mode.loop: Loop chapter repeats this chapter until stopped.
gui.livingword.disc.mode.single: Single chapter stops after this chapter finishes.
gui.livingword.disc.reverse_hint: Right-click a row to go backward.
gui.livingword.disc.search_status: Press Enter to select the matching book.
gui.livingword.disc.title: Scripture Disc
gui.livingword.bible.title: Living Word
message.livingword.bible.nearby_listenin: Started a nearby John 3 listening session.
message.livingword.bible.search_results: Showing %s search result(s). Click a verse to open it.
message.livingword.audio.local_bible_sto: Stopped Bible audio for disc preview.
Stopped Bible audio for shared listening.
message.livingword.audio.world_stopped_f: Stopped nearby listening on this client for Bible audio.
message.livingword.disc.session_paused: Scripture Disc paused. Empty-hand click this jukebox to resume.
message.livingword.disc.session_reset: Scripture Disc stopped, ejected, and saved position cleared.
message.livingword.lectern.station_ready: Lectern ready for %s. Sneak-use the Bible on this lectern to start nearby listening.
